Episodes.Title: 1600 Candles
Episodes.Director: Caleb Meurer, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Stan and Francine are upset when Steve reaches puberty. However, Francine wants him to stay young, and Stan wants him to skip puberty and go straight to 21. And both of them use top-secret CIA technology to make sure it happens.

Episodes.Title: The One That Got Away

Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Roger discovers that one of his personas has taken on a life of his own. Back at home, the Smith family becomes addicted to the 1970s electronic game "Simon."

Episodes.Title: One Little Word
Episodes.Director: Rodney Clouden, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: When Stan becomes his boss's go-to guy, he feels like he can't say no to anything including outrageous personal requests. But when Francine gets roped into the annoying ordeal and her romantic Valentine's Day get-away is ruined, s...

Episodes.Title: Choosy Wives Choose Smith
Episodes.Plot: When Stan finds out that Francine was engaged before they met to a man who disappeared in a plane crash but is still alive, he launches an elaborate plan to find out if she would choose the other man instead of him.

Episodes.Title: Escape from Pearl Bailey
Episodes.Director: Bob Bowen, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Steve gets revenge on the popular kids at his school after they smear his girlfriend who was running for class president. But he later learns that somebody else was responsible for the attacks, and the popular kids want revenge.

Episodes.Title: Pulling Double Booty
Episodes.Director: John Aoshima, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: After Hayley is dumped by Jeff, she starts dating Stan's CIA body double. But when the body double starts making moves on Francine, Stan decides to break them up in his own unique way.

Episodes.Title: Phantom of the Telethon
Episodes.Director: Brent Woods, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Roger tries to sabotage Stan's CIA telethon because Stan didn't give him credit for coming up with the idea.

Episodes.Title: Chimdale
Episodes.Director: Pam Cooke, Jansen Yee, Ron Hughart
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Steve has to wear a back brace because of his Scoliosis, but then finds out that Stan has been bald since college. Meanwhile, Roger, Francine, and Hayley go to a spa together even though they only have two free passes.

Episodes.Title: Stan Time
Episodes.Director: Joseph Daniello, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Stan takes a pill that allows him to stay awake all night and never be tired, so that he can have some personal time. But when Francine finds out, she decides to start taking the pills herself.

Episodes.Title: Family Affair
Episodes.Director: Tim Parsons, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: The Smiths are angry and jealous when they discover that Roger has been seeing other families behind their backs, and Klaus tries to get the family to go to a Fabulous Thunderbirds concert with him.

Episodes.Title: Live and Let Fry

Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Stan finds a way to get around Langley Falls' ban on trans fats, and Roger poses as Klaus to get his inheritance for him.

Episodes.Title: Roy Rogers McFreely
Episodes.Director: Bob Bowen, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Stan and Roger go to war with each other after Roger is named president of the neighborhood homeowners association.

Episodes.Title: Jack's Back
Episodes.Director: Rodney Clouden, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Steve becomes friends with Stan's father and tries to talk Stan into helping him at his upcoming trial, while Hayley gets an internship at Roger's bar.

Episodes.Title: Bar Mitzvah Hustle
Episodes.Director: Brent Woods, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: When a rival steals Steve's girlfriend, Steve tries to get revenge by launching a plot to steal his Bar Mitzvah presents.

Episodes.Title: Wife Insurance
Episodes.Director: John Aoshima, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Francine is upset when she finds out that Stan has a backup wife in place just in case she dies, so she decides to find a backup of her own; Wheels and the Legman investigate the case of Hayley's missing iPod Shuffle.

Episodes.Title: Delorean Story-An
Episodes.Director: Joseph Daniello, Ron Hughart, Anthony Lioi
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: In an attempt to bond as father and son, Steve and Stan drive to Albuquerque to purchase a door for a DeLorean Stan has been building. Meanwhile Roger Hayley and Francine try to get adventures of there own.

Episodes.Title: Every Which Way But Lose
Episodes.Director: Pam Cooke, Jansen Yee, Ron Hughart
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Roger helps Steve get revenge on his father when he cuts him from the football team. But when their plan is successful, Stan doesn't take it very well.

Episodes.Title: Weiner of Our Discontent
Episodes.Director: Tim Parsons, Ron Hughart, Brent Woods
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Roger is heartbroken after he finds out that he's not "The Decider" and actually came to Earth as a crash test dummy, so he takes a job at a hotdog factory.

Episodes.Title: Daddy Queerest
Episodes.Director: Albert Calleros, Ron Hughart, Brent Woods
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Terry's father, a former star fullback for the Redskins, doesn't know that Terry is gay. So when he visits, Terry says he's living with Francine and that Stan is gay.

Episodes.Title: Stan's Night Out
Episodes.Director: Bob Bowen, Ron Hughart, Brent Woods
Episodes.Writer: Seth MacFarlane, Mike Barker, Matt Weitzman
Episodes.Actors: Seth MacFarlane, Wendy Schaal, Scott Grimes
Episodes.Plot: Stan's night out of fun with the guys from the agency snowballs into a kidnapping situation, and could possibly end in murder. Meanwhile, Roger doesn't realize that he's been invited to a fraternity "pig party."
